title: eBay Store and Product Lead Finder input

searchUrls.title: eBay search or category URLs
searchUrls.description: Optional direct public eBay search/category URLs.

includeSellerInfo.title: Include seller info
includeSellerInfo.description: Extract public seller/store data when visible.

includeImages.title: Include images
includeImages.description: Include product image URLs when visible.

includeSoldCount.title: Include sold count
includeSoldCount.description: Include sold count when publicly visible.

condition.title: Condition
condition.description: Optional condition hint. Examples: new, used, open box, refurbished.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Optional Apify proxy configuration. Useful for reliable public eBay requests.

debugMode.title: Debug mode
debugMode.description: Save extra request/debug information to the key-value store.
